tasks.subject: Task 1: Backend â€” persist state_changed_at
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `state_changed_at` to the model, schema, and store so it is written on first insert and updated only when `rollup_state` changes.

**Files:**
- Modify: `backend/internal/model/types.go:66-76`
- Modify: `backend/internal/store/db.go:8-55`
- Modify: `backend/internal/store/packages.go:10-134`
- Modify: `backend/internal/store/packages_test.go` (add test)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `model.Package` has `StateChangedAt *time.Time`
- [ ] Fresh DB: `state_changed_at` set on first insert
- [ ] Same-state upsert: `state_changed_at` unchanged
- [ ] State-change upsert: `state_changed_at` updated
- [ ] `go test ./internal/store/... -v` passes

**Verify:** `cd backend && go test ./internal/store/... -v -run TestStateChangedAt` â†’ PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/internal/model/types.go", "backend/internal/store/db.go", "backend/internal/store/packages.go", "backend/internal/store/packages_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && go test ./internal/store/... -v -run TestStateChangedAt", "acceptanceCriteria": ["model.Package has StateChangedAt *time.Time field", "state_changed_at set on first insert", "same-state upsert leaves state_changed_at unchanged", "state-change upsert updates state_changed_at", "go test ./internal/store/... -v passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Frontend â€” display state duration in PackageCard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Show "for 23m" right-aligned in row 1 of the package card, only for `scheduled`, `building`, and `finishing` rollup states.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/types/api.ts:27-37`
- Modify: `frontend/src/components/PackageCard.vue`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `Package` interface has `state_changed_at?: string`
- [ ] `stateAge` returns a formatted string for `scheduled`, `building`, `finished` when `state_changed_at` is present
- [ ] `stateAge` returns `null` for all other states
- [ ] Duration renders right-aligned in row 1, before the OBS link
- [ ] `cd frontend && npx vue-tsc --noEmit` exits 0

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npx vue-tsc --noEmit` â†’ exits 0 with no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/types/api.ts", "frontend/src/components/PackageCard.vue"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npx vue-tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Package interface has state_changed_at?: string", "stateAge computed returns string for scheduled/building/finished states only", "duration renders right-aligned in row 1 before OBS link", "vue-tsc --noEmit exits 0"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
